summary: Added an opt-in strict companion-input mode to validate_asset_references and exposed it in scripts/validate_asset_references.py as --strict-companion-inputs.
test_results: The new strict-mode test failed before implementation with unexpected keyword argument. After implementation, tests/test_asset_manifest_storage_audit.py passed: 6 passed. Default validate_asset_references passed with ok=true and five warnings. Strict validate_asset_references failed as expected with five missing_validation_input errors. Targeted pytest bundle passed: 61 passed, 5 warnings. output-normalize-structure and audit_output_storage passed. output-integrity-audit failed on 74 unexpected missing mark-scheme image paths.
acceptance_criteria_status: Satisfied: default validator behavior still exits zero with warnings on missing companion inputs.
Satisfied: strict companion mode returns ok=false with hard missing_validation_input errors for missing companions.
Satisfied: no generated output files were written outside .agent-runs.
repo_hygiene_notes: The only generated report from the exploratory project gate was written under the iteration-03 .agent-runs directory.
known_risks: Strict mode intentionally fails on the current workspace until persisted companion outputs are generated.
The live output-integrity audit still fails on missing mark-scheme image paths; this is a separate output data issue.
